✦ Printer's Notes ✦
📜  For finest results, print on card stock (80–110 lb cover weight)
✂️  Cut along the outer border of each card after printing
🖨️  If your printer supports duplex (double-sided) printing, both faces will align perfectly — select "Flip on short edge"
🎨  Enable "Background graphics" in your print dialog to preserve the parchment colour & design
✤
